title: Data Engineer

rationales.taskAutomation: Standard ETL construction, schema migrations, and data-quality checks are now largely AI-generated; enterprise data architecture at scale still requires engineering judgment.
rationales.toolMaturity: Pipeline-as-code frameworks paired with AI codegen (dbt Copilot-style tools, AI-assisted Airflow/Spark authoring) are mature and improving.
rationales.adoption: Common practice at data-forward firms; spreading to mid-market as managed pipeline platforms lower the bar.
rationales.agenticExposure: Pipeline monitoring, self-healing data-quality checks, and routine migration scripts are agent-ownable today.

tasksGrowing: Enterprise data architecture and platform strategy at scale
Governance and lineage design for AI training data
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 15-1252 (Software Developers, closest data-pipeline mapping), p25-p75
insight: AI now writes and self-heals most routine pipeline code, from ETL scripts to data-quality checks. The lasting work is architecting data platforms for AI training and RAG workloads, where governance and lineage decisions still need a person accountable for them.
